title: Vocabulary Search
description: The Vocabulary Search module provides full-text and hierarchical browsing across OMOP standardized vocabularies, including SNOMED CT, RxNorm, LOINC, ICD-10, and many others. Researchers can explore concept relationships, review domain and vocabulary metadata, and identify the precise standard concepts needed to define clinically rigorous cohort criteria and concept sets.
tips: Use the domain and vocabulary filters together to narrow large result sets when searching for broad clinical terms such as 'diabetes' or 'infection'.
Examine the concept hierarchy view to discover descendant concepts you may want to include in a concept set via the 'Include Descendants' option in the Concept Set Builder.
Standard concepts are marked with a green indicator; prefer these when building cohort criteria to ensure cross-database compatibility.
Copy a concept ID directly from the search results to quickly locate it in the Concept Set Builder or Cohort Expression editor.
Refer to the OMOP Domains appendix for a structured overview of how concepts are organized across clinical domains within the CDM.
